info.title: Clint API
info.description: API for managing contacts, deals, and tags in the Clint application

delete.description: Remove a tag from a contact

requestBody.description: Tag identifier - provide either tag id or tag name

tag_id.description: The ID of the tag to be removed

tag_name.description: The name of the tag to be removed

error.example: You must provide either a tag id or a tag name

parameters.name: fields

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of WhatsApp Official channel accounts. Only returns channels with type WHATSAPP_OFFICIAL that are not deleted.

200.description: A paginated list of channel accounts

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Execute a single chart query and return its data.

parameters.description: Limit rows returned (applies to table/list chart types)
parameters.name: limit

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of chats for a specific channel account. Results are sorted by last_message_at descending.

message.example: Param channel_account_id must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of chats for a specific contact. Results are sorted by last_message_at descending.

message.example: Param contact_id must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a single chat by ID. Only returns chats belonging to the authenticated owner.

message.example: Param ID must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Execute dashboard chart queries and return data. Charts are paginated at 10 per page. Individual chart failures are handled gracefully and return an error message instead of failing the entire request.

parameters.description: Limit rows returned per chart (applies to table/list chart types)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of chart IDs to fetch (returns only these charts instead of all)
parameters.name: chart_ids

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a single dashboard with its list of charts.

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of dashboards.

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a single message template by ID. Validates that the template belongs to a WhatsApp Official channel account owned by the authenticated user.

message.example: Param ID must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of message templates linked to a WhatsApp Official channel account. The channel_account_id query parameter is required and must belong to the authenticated owner.

200.description: A paginated list of message templates

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of messages for a specific chat. Messages are sorted by created_at descending.

message.example: Param chat_id must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

get.description: Retrieve a single message by ID. Only returns messages belonging to the authenticated owner.

message.example: Param ID must be a valid UUID

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

post.description: Send an audio message via WhatsApp Official. The audio URL is sent directly to the Meta API. No caption support for audio messages. Returns immediately with QUEUED status.

channel_account_id.description: UUID of the WhatsApp Official channel account

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to send the audio to

url.description: Direct URL of the audio file to send

chat_id.description: Optional UUID of an existing chat. If not provided, the system will find or create a chat automatically.

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

post.description: Send a document message via WhatsApp Official. The document URL is sent directly to the Meta API. Filename is required and will be displayed to the recipient. Returns immediately with QUEUED status.

channel_account_id.description: UUID of the WhatsApp Official channel account

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to send the document to

url.description: Direct URL of the document to send

chat_id.description: Optional UUID of an existing chat. If not provided, the system will find or create a chat automatically.

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

post.description: Send an image message via WhatsApp Official. The image URL is sent directly to the Meta API (no upload required). Returns immediately with QUEUED status.

channel_account_id.description: UUID of the WhatsApp Official channel account

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to send the image to

url.description: Direct URL of the image to send

chat_id.description: Optional UUID of an existing chat. If not provided, the system will find or create a chat automatically.
UUID of the chat (existing or newly created)

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

post.description: Send a WhatsApp message template (HSM). Template messages can be sent at any time, even when the 24-hour messaging window is closed. The template must be APPROVED by Meta and belong to the specified channel account. Variable placeholders ({{1}}, {{2}}, etc.) in the template are replaced with the provided parameter values.

channel_account_id.description: UUID of the WhatsApp Official channel account

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to send the template to

template_id.description: UUID of the message template to send. Must have APPROVED status.

chat_id.description: Optional UUID of an existing chat. If not provided, the system will find or create a chat automatically.

parameters.description: Variable values to replace {{1}}, {{2}}, etc. in the template components. Each array position maps to the corresponding placeholder number.

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

post.description: Send a text message via WhatsApp Official. Reuses the existing message sending flow — validates channel account, contact, and messaging window, then dispatches to the WhatsApp provider. Returns immediately with QUEUED status.

channel_account_id.description: UUID of the WhatsApp Official channel account

contact_id.description: UUID of the contact to send the message to

message.example: Hello, how can I help you?

chat_id.description: Optional UUID of an existing chat. If not provided, the system will find or create a chat automatically.
UUID of the chat (existing or newly created)

value.message: Param channel_account_id must be a valid UUID
Param message must not be empty
Channel account type must be WHATSAPP_OFFICIAL
Contact does not have a phone number
Messaging window is closed. Use a template message to reopen the conversation

401.description: Authentication error - invalid or missing api-token

channel_not_found.summary: Channel account not found or wrong owner

contact_not_found.summary: Contact not found or wrong owner

queryParam_page.description: Select the page of the result
queryParam_page.name: page

queryParam_offset.description: Number of rows skipped of the result
queryParam_offset.name: offset

totalCount.description: Total items based on current filters

totalPages.description: Total pages based on current filters

PaginatedV2.description: V2 paginated response with snake_case keys

total_count.description: Total items based on current filters

total_pages.description: Total pages based on current filters

ChartData.description: Chart data returned from a Cube.js query. The result format varies by chart type.

result.description: Chart result data. Format depends on chart type: number types return {value}, table types return {columns, rows}, series types (line, bar, pie, etc.) return an array of series objects.

oneOf.description: Series chart result (line, bar, pie, etc.)

error.description: Present instead of result when the chart query failed

closed_at.description: Timestamp when the chat was closed

first_customer_message_at.description: Timestamp of the first customer message in the chat

close_window_at.description: Timestamp when the WhatsApp messaging window closes (24h after last customer message)

layout.description: Chart position in the dashboard grid

charts_count.description: Number of charts in the dashboard

content.example: Hello, how can I help you?

source.description: Origin of the message (e.g. API, CAMPAIGN, WEB)
